text_excerpt: Latest Publications Archives - Ros Altmann Ros Altmann Home Profile Latest Publications Press Release ROS ALTMANN Ros is a leading authority on later life issues, including pensions, social care and retirement policy. Numerous major awards have recognised her work to demystify finance and make pensions work better for people. She was the UK Pensions Minister from 2015 – 16 and is a member of the House of Lords where she sits as Baroness Altmann of Tottenham. Ros Altmann Ros Altmann Home Profile Latest Publications Press Release Toggle navigation Home Profile Latest Publications Press Release Ros Altmann Home Profile Latest Publications Press Release Browsed by Category: Latest Publications Councils should spend huge pension fund surpluses on services instead of hiking tax, says ROS ALTMANN Councils should spend huge pension fund surpluses on services instead of hiking tax, says ROS ALTMANN January 1, 2026 Ros Altmann Ros wrote a Comment article for ThisIsMoney Daily Mail website, highlighting that there are large surpluses in local authority pension schemes, so employer pension contributions are not needed at the moment – spend the money on local services. ( link to pdf ) Open External article Read More OPINION: Government must see pension investment as game changer for growth OPINION: Government must see pension investment as game changer for growth December 9, 2025 Ros Altmann Ros wrote a comment piece for the Jewish News explaining that using pension assets to boost growth can be the ‘game-changer’ the Government desperately needs so more of the £80bn in tax relief helps Britain, rather than being free to boost all other countries and not our own? ( link to pdf ) Open External article Read More Ros Altmann: Restricting salary sacrifice is a lose-lose policy Ros Altmann: Restricting salary sacrifice is a lose-lose policy December 5, 2025 Ros Altmann Ros’ Opinion Column in Money Marketing explains the damage that capping salary sacrifice is likely to inflict on DC pensions adequacy in future. ( link to pdf ) Open External article Read More Salary sacrifice cut will hit workers’ pay and pensions – and raise employer costs, warns ROS ALTMANN Salary sacrifice cut will hit workers’ pay and pensions – and raise employer costs, warns ROS ALTMANN November 29, 2025 Ros Altmann Ros wrote a Comment article for ThisIsMoney Daily Mail website, warning that the Government’s plans to cap salary sacrifice for pension contributions will damage future DC pensions and add to employer costs – but does not affect public sector schemes. Open External article Read More IHT plans could ‘kill off’ modern pensions IHT plans could ‘kill off’ modern pensions November 10, 2025 Ros Altmann Ros wrote a Comment piece for FT Adviser, explaining the damage to future pensions which is likely to be caused by the draconian retrospective IHT raid on unused pensions. Open External article Read More Lobbyists make final push for gov’t rethink over IHT on pensions Lobbyists make final push for gov’t rethink over IHT on pensions November 5, 2025 Ros Altmann Ros is quoted in Corporate Adviser, alongside many other experts giving evidence to the House of Lords Finance Committee about the need to change the Government’s proposals to impose IHT on unused pensions. Open External article Read More Ten ways Rachel Reeves might shake up pensions in the Budget, by former pensions minister ROS ALTMANN Ten ways Rachel Reeves might shake up pensions in the Budget, by former pensions minister ROS ALTMANN October 19, 2025 Ros Altmann Ros wrote a Comment article for Daily Mail’s ThisIsMoney, outlining ten potential pension reforms the Budget might consider – and warning against problems some would cause, while suggesting two that could be very positive.
